overview: I built Dino, a Dean Martin-inspired AI dining concierge for Las Vegas using FastAPI, Google Maps Places API, and Claude Code. Going all-in on Claude Code shifted my role from writing bad Python to writing specs.

keyPoints.title: Claude Code shifted my role to spec-writing, not coding
CLAUDE.md at 75 lines drove the entire build
Google Calendar deep links beat OAuth — zero auth, two clicks
Claude-in-Claude artifacts bypassed tools entirely — real backend required
Railway, not Streamlit, needed for persistent FastAPI process
